description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the ruby:latest Docker image and a before_script that runs apt-get update -qy, apt-get install -y nodejs npm, and node -v && npm -v before each job. Define a single pages job in the default test stage that executes npm ci, gem install bundler:1.17.3, bundle install, bundle exec middleman build --verbose, and mv build public. Configure the job to publish the public/ directory as a Pages artifact and to run only on the master branch. No caches or services are needed.
